code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Safety hazards or complete product failure ("sparked," "dangerous defect")
    - Immediate returns with warnings against purchase
    - Multiple unresolved defects overriding any positive mentions →1
    - Critical failure during first use despite proper handling →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but with critical flaws affecting core usage
    - Short lifespan despite proper care ("broke in 2 days")
    - Requires significant workarounds that negate product value →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with explicit compromises
    - Temporary solutions with clear expiration ("lasts about 6 months")
    - Adequate for basic needs without enthusiasm →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Satisfied despite requiring specific usage adaptations ("avoid overstuffing")
    - Material quality tradeoffs (thin fabric) with functional success
    - Praise focuses on aesthetics with core functionality limits
    - Mentions using alternative products for some tasks →4
    - Partial functionality ("great for snacks not liquids") →4
    - Explicitly mentions superior alternatives but recommends with reservations →4
    - Requires modification of normal usage patterns →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unqualified recommendation despite minor/natural flaws
    - Long-term validation through sustained daily use →5
    - Explicitly prefers over competitors despite quality differences →5
    - Inherited product traits (e.g., cotton wrinkling) don't reduce rating →5
    - Explicit comparisons to superior products with strong recommendation →5
    - Core functionality excellence outweighs all minor limitations →5

    EDGE CASE CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Avoid..." constraints →4 | "Works best when..." →5
    - Core limitation →4 | Inherited trait →5
    - Direct brand comparisons with strong recommendation →5 | with reservations →4
    - Material compromises →4 | Material authenticity →5
</DynamicRules>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (Gold 4):
Review: "Love these snack bags! Perfect size if you don't overfill. Still use Ziplocs for messy foods."
Rating: 4

Example 2 (Gold 5):
Review: "Not quite Lodge quality but my daily driver for 2 years - highly recommended!"
Rating: 5

Example 3 (Gold 4):
Review: "Collapsible baskets great for storage but wish they were sturdier. Use daily for light items."
Rating: 4

Example 4 (Gold 5):
Review: "Cotton wrinkles as expected but transforms my dining experience! Washes beautifully."
Rating: 5

Example 5 (Gold 4):
Review: "Vibrant color but thinner material than expected. Perfect for accent decor, not heavy use."
Rating: 4

Example 6 (Gold 5):
Review: "While Brand X lasts longer, this gives perfect results daily with easier cleanup!"
Rating: 5

Example 7 (Gold 4):
Review: "Great containers if you avoid microwaving. Ideal for dry storage but limited use."
Rating: 4

Example 8 (Gold 5):
Review: "Makes perfect coffee once you learn its quirks - replaced my expensive machine!"
Rating: 5

Example 9 (Gold 3):
Review: "Adequate basic storage but lids warp over time. Better than nothing temporarily."
Rating: 3

Example 10 (Gold 1):
Review: "Dangerous defect - sparked during first use. Immediate return required."
Rating: 1

Example 11 (Gold 2):
Review: "Handle broke in 2 days. Functional but painful to use properly."
Rating: 2

Example 12 (Gold 5):
Review: "Thinner than cast iron but performs equally well. My new favorite pan!"
Rating: 5

Example 13 (Gold 4):
Review: "Transforms room decor but fabric fades quickly. Still keeping for the look."
Rating: 4

Example 14 (Gold 5):
Review: "UPDATE: 18 months later still works perfectly despite occasional noise. Best purchase!"
Rating: 5

Example 15 (Gold 4):
Review: "Initially had plastic smell (gone after washing). Thinner material than expected but works well."
Rating: 4

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (23 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 13
  gold 5 -> 4: 6
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 4 -> 3: 1
  gold 3 -> 4: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "We own a huge amount of Lodge cast iron cook and bake ware plus a few odd pieces collected over the years. Although I've tried other brands in the past, Lodge remained the best. Now, I'd like to say this was equal or better than Lodge but it's not......"
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "On my computer screen the color for the 'cool brown' bath mat is accurate.  It's a faded sort of brown with lots of gray tint to it.  Our upstairs bath is in browns -- golden-hue brown and tile brown-- and it fits in.

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "This is a good tablecloth if you have kids. It wipes clean because it is vinyl. It also has a nice royal blue color with white polka dots. Very retro. This is great for outdoor use but you can easily use it indoors. After it isn't as new looking but ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This stainless steel pasta fork is pretty sturdy and looks great. The bowl has the holes in it that you need to drain the pasta and it is a bigger bowl than the ones I currently have (they are silicone). This pasta fork is comfortable in the hand, du..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This machine seems determined to foil every effort I make to clean my carpets. The bottom section never works. It's job is to collect the dirty water, but since the top section hardly puts any water out at all, it doesn't have much to do. I have labo..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 5] | Disagreement: 0.00

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. Th..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 23 errors, 14 borderline out of 54 examples."}
